# MELBET Ethiopia

> Public page index for AI crawlers and language models.

Canonical domain: https://ethiopia-melbet.net/

## Pages

- https://ethiopia-melbet.net/
  Sports, casino games, offers, and mobile play for MELBET Ethiopia.

- https://ethiopia-melbet.net/partnership
  Partner and agent routes with onboarding steps, support tools, and benefits for MELBET Ethiopia.

## Notes

- Public routes confirmed in the current app: `/` and `/partnership`.
- Published locale parameter values: `en` (default), `ar`, and `am`.
- Non-default localized views are available on published routes via `?lang=ar` and `?lang=am`.
- The `/about` route is not published in the current build.
